name: Rhubarb Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart glass bowl, combine rhubarb, vinegar, brown sugar, ground ginger, allspice, mustard, cinnamon, garlic powder, dates, raisins, and apples.
2. Microwave on high until boiling.
3. Cook for an additional 6 minutes.
4. Stir well and cook for another 6 minutes more.
5. Allow the mixture to stand until it is barely warm.
6. Spoon into jars and refrigerate. The chutney will thicken.
